languages.text: "Ошметок древнего бога, что мы обратили в раба и оружие..." {n}Вам требуется несколько мгновений, чтобы понять — ксенос обращается к поверженному К'тану.{/n} "Тень паразита, твое место — {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_TrazynDealCtan}в галерее моего Музеона{/d}, служить вечным памятником нашего превосходства и вашего ничтожества".

traits.locale_text: "Ошметок древнего бога, что мы обратили в рабов и оружие..." {n}Вам требуется несколько мгновений, чтобы понять — ксенос обращается к поверженному К'тану.{/n} "Тень паразита, твое место — в галерее моего Музеона, служить вечным памятником нашего превосходства и вашего ничтожества".

languages.text: "A remnant of the ancient god that we turned into slaves and weapons..." {n}It takes you a few moments to realise — the xenos is addressing the vanquished C'tan.{/n} "Shadow of the parasite, your place is in the gallery of my Museion, to serve as an eternal monument to our superiority and your insignificance."
languages.original_text: "Ошметок древнего бога, что мы обратили в рабов и оружие..." {n}Вам требуется несколько мгновений, чтобы понять — ксенос обращается к поверженному К'тану.{/n} "Тень паразита, твое место — в галерее моего Музеона, служить вечным памятником нашего превосходства и вашего ничтожества".

traits.locale_text: "A remnant of the ancient god that we turned into slaves and weapons..." {n}It takes you a few moments to realise — the xenos is addressing the vanquished C'tan.{/n} "Shadow of the parasite, your place is in the gallery of my Museion, to serve as an eternal monument to our superiority and your insignificance."

"A remnant of the ancient god that we turned into slaves and weapons..." {n}It takes you a few moments to realise — the xenos is addressing the vanquished C'tan.{/n} "Shadow of the parasite, your place is in the gallery of my Museion, to serve as an eternal monument to our superiority and your insignificance."

"A remnant of the ancient god that we turned into slaves and weapons..." {n}It takes you a few moments to realise — the xenos is addressing the vanquished C'tan.{/n} "Shadow of the parasite, your place is in the gallery of my Museion, to serve as an eternal monument to our superiority and your insignificance."

languages.text: “远古神祇的残片，被我们驯化成奴隶和武器……”{n}你过了几秒才意识到，这异形是在对那被击败的星神说话。{/n}“寄生虫的阴影，你的归宿就在我陈列馆的展厅里，成为彰显我们之伟大与你之渺小的永恒丰碑。”
languages.original_text: "A remnant of the ancient god that we turned into slaves and weapons..." {n}It takes you a few moments to realise — the xenos is addressing the vanquished C'tan.{/n} "Shadow of the parasite, your place is in the gallery of my Museion, to serve as an eternal monument to our superiority and your insignificance."

traits.locale_text: “远古神祇的残片，被我们驯化成奴隶和武器……”{n}你过了几秒才意识到，这异形是在对那被击败的星神说话。{/n}“寄生虫的阴影，你的归宿就在我陈列馆的展厅里，成为彰显我们之伟大与你之渺小的永恒丰碑。”

languages.text: «Un resto del antiguo dios al que convertimos en esclavos y armas...». {n}Tardas un momento en darte cuenta de que el xenos está hablándole al C'tan vencido.{/n} «Sombra del parásito, tu lugar está en la galería de mi Museion, como monumento eterno a nuestra supremacía y tu insignificancia».
languages.original_text: "A remnant of the ancient god that we turned into slaves and weapons..." {n}It takes you a few moments to realise — the xenos is addressing the vanquished C'tan.{/n} "Shadow of the parasite, your place is in the gallery of my Museion, to serve as an eternal monument to our superiority and your insignificance."

traits.locale_text: «Un resto del antiguo dios al que convertimos en esclavos y armas...». {n}Tardas un momento en darte cuenta de que el xenos está hablándole al C'tan vencido.{/n} «Sombra del parásito, tu lugar está en la galería de mi Museion, como monumento eterno a nuestra supremacía y tu insignificancia».

languages.text: « Les vestiges d'un ancien dieu que nous avons réduit en esclavage et utilisé comme arme... » {n}Au bout de quelques instants, vous réalisez que le xénos s'adresse au C'tan vaincu.{/n} « Ombre du parasite, votre place est dans les galeries de mon Muséion, où vous servirez de témoignage éternel de notre supériorité... et de votre insignifiance. »
languages.original_text: "A remnant of the ancient god that we turned into slaves and weapons..." {n}It takes you a few moments to realise — the xenos is addressing the vanquished C'tan.{/n} "Shadow of the parasite, your place is in the gallery of my Museion, to serve as an eternal monument to our superiority and your insignificance."

traits.locale_text: « Les vestiges d'un ancien dieu que nous avons réduit en esclavage et utilisé comme arme... » {n}Au bout de quelques instants, vous réalisez que le xénos s'adresse au C'tan vaincu.{/n} « Ombre du parasite, votre place est dans les galeries de mon Muséion, où vous servirez de témoignage éternel de notre supériorité... et de votre insignifiance. »

languages.text: "Kölelere ve silahlara dönüştürdüğümüz kadim tanrının kalıntısı..." {n}Anlaman birkaç saniye sürüyor. Zeno, mağlup edilen C'tan'a hitap ediyor.{/n} "Parazitin gölgesi... Senin yerin, üstünlüğümüzün ve önemsizliğinin ebedî bir anıtı olarak hizmet etmek üzere Museion'umun galerisidir."
languages.original_text: "A remnant of the ancient god that we turned into slaves and weapons..." {n}It takes you a few moments to realise — the xenos is addressing the vanquished C'tan.{/n} "Shadow of the parasite, your place is in the gallery of my Museion, to serve as an eternal monument to our superiority and your insignificance."

traits.locale_text: "Kölelere ve silahlara dönüştürdüğümüz kadim tanrının kalıntısı..." {n}Anlaman birkaç saniye sürüyor. Zeno, mağlup edilen C'tan'a hitap ediyor.{/n} "Parazitin gölgesi... Senin yerin, üstünlüğümüzün ve önemsizliğinin ebedî bir anıtı olarak hizmet etmek üzere Museion'umun galerisidir."

languages.text: "Ein Überrest des alten Gottes, aus dem wir Sklaven und Waffen gemacht haben ..." {n}Du brauchst einige Momente, um zu erkennen — der Xenos spricht mit dem toten C'tan.{/n} "Schatten des Parasiten, dein Platz ist in der Galerie meines Museions, wo du als ewiges Monument unserer Überlegenheit und deiner Bedeutungslosigkeit dienen wirst."
languages.original_text: "A remnant of the ancient god that we turned into slaves and weapons..." {n}It takes you a few moments to realise — the xenos is addressing the vanquished C'tan.{/n} "Shadow of the parasite, your place is in the gallery of my Museion, to serve as an eternal monument to our superiority and your insignificance."

traits.locale_text: "Ein Überrest des alten Gottes, aus dem wir Sklaven und Waffen gemacht haben ..." {n}Du brauchst einige Momente, um zu erkennen — der Xenos spricht mit dem toten C'tan.{/n} "Schatten des Parasiten, dein Platz ist in der Galerie meines Museions, wo du als ewiges Monument unserer Überlegenheit und deiner Bedeutungslosigkeit dienen wirst."

languages.text: 「奴隷や武器にした古代神が残したもの…」{n}しばらくの間、その意味が分からなかった。異星人は敗れたクトンを指しているのだ。{/n}「寄生虫の影よ、お前は私のミュゼイオンのギャラリーに飾られ、我々の優位さとお前たちの無様な証となる永遠の記念碑となるだろう。」
languages.original_text: "A remnant of the ancient god that we turned into slaves and weapons..." {n}It takes you a few moments to realise — the xenos is addressing the vanquished C'tan.{/n} "Shadow of the parasite, your place is in the gallery of my Museion, to serve as an eternal monument to our superiority and your insignificance."

traits.locale_text: 「奴隷や武器にした古代神が残したもの…」{n}しばらくの間、その意味が分からなかった。異星人は敗れたクトンを指しているのだ。{/n}「寄生虫の影よ、お前は私のミュゼイオンのギャラリーに飾られ、我々の優位さとお前たちの無様な証となる永遠の記念碑となるだろう。」
